dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6018 IH: Bringing Assistance for Rural Needs During Shutdowns Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Wied (for himself, Mr. Bergman, Mr. Schmidt, Mr. Mackenzie, Mr. Guest, Mr. Harrigan, and Mrs. McClain Delaney) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To ensure that Farm Services Agency offices stay open during a government shutdown.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Bringing Assistance for Rural Needs During Shutdowns Act.

section.header: Farm Services Agency to be regarded as providing essential services during a government shutdown
section.text: Any services by an officer or employee of the Farm Services Agency shall be deemed, for purposes of section 1342 of title 31, United States Code, services for emergencies involving the safety of human life or the protection of property.
